title: region — validation rules
description: Six custom Laravel validation rules published by RegionServiceProvider::boot() so any FormRequest / Data class can validate Region-adjacent fields. Named after their intent so they read cleanly at the composition site.

rules.name: valid_country_code
rules.description: Ensures the value is a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (2 uppercase letters). In default `strict` mode also requires the code to be present in `data/country-defaults.json`. Set `unknown` to accept any well-formed ISO 3166-1 code — used for supranational zones (EU) that don't have per-country defaults.

params.name: mode
params.description: strict = must exist in country-defaults.json; unknown = any well-formed ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 accepted.

rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid ISO 3166-1 country code (2 uppercase letters, e.g. US, AE, GB).

rules.name: valid_currency_code
rules.description: Ensures the value is a well-formed ISO 4217 currency code (3 uppercase letters — 'USD', 'AED', 'GBP', 'EUR'). Not gated on the country_code — a tenant in AE may legitimately price in USD.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid ISO 4217 currency code (3 uppercase letters, e.g. USD, AED, GBP).

rules.name: valid_iana_timezone
rules.description: Ensures the value is a member of PHP's `\DateTimeZone::listIdentifiers()` — the full IANA tz database. In default `strict` mode rejects deprecated aliases (e.g. `US/Pacific`) — use the canonical IANA form (`America/Los_Angeles`).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Dubai).

rules.name: valid_bcp47_locale
rules.description: Ensures the value is a syntactically valid BCP-47 language tag. Delegates to `Locale::parseLocale()`. Distinct from the sibling rule shipped by the `user` module — this one accepts ANY BCP-47 tag (regions may serve locales the tenant hasn't enabled yet; the user module gates on tenant-enabled).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid BCP-47 language tag (e.g. en, en-US, ar-AE, zh-Hans).

rules.name: valid_tax_rate
rules.description: Ensures the value is a decimal 0..100 with up to 3 decimal places (matches the DECIMAL(5,3) storage). Rejects negative rates + rates > 100. Used on `tax_config.default_rate_percent` + every entry in `tax_config.rates[].rate_percent`.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a decimal between 0 and 100 with up to 3 decimal places.

rules.name: weekend_days_valid
rules.description: Ensures the value is a non-empty array whose entries are all valid day-of-week names (lowercase). Accepts 1-7 entries. Rejects duplicates. The default per country in `data/country-defaults.json` is normally `[saturday, sunday]` (Western) or `[friday, saturday]` (Gulf); tenants in the Maldives may opt for `[friday]` alone.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a non-empty array of day names (monday, tuesday, wednesday, thursday, friday, saturday, sunday), with no duplicates.
